title: A Jet Black Arrival
overview: Magoichi doesn't remember his past, but after he was helped, he now has the goal of fighting to protect those who helped him.

title: A Red-Orange Oath
overview: A mysterious man appears to save Magoichi and Deku from danger, but despite his kindness, the truths he tells will deeply mark the souls of both friends.

title: Steel Blue Memories
overview: Tsurukubi and Hotarubi leave the Saika village. Magoichi and Deku set out to find them. During a break, Magoichi explains to his comrade how Tsuru and Hotaru met.

title: A Golden Light
overview: Hotarubi recalls his memories, the assassin training he received as a child, his meeting, then his escape with Turukubi. He also remembers what Tsurukubi told him about Armors, which tap into the life energy of their wearer to unleash their power.

title: A Dark Gray Testament
overview: Cornered by the Spanish conquerors, Kurohyo sees his life flash before his eyes: his past full of material and physical difficulties, in addition to suffering cause by the absence of his father, whom he blames for the death of his entire family.

title: A Black Encounter
overview: The commander of the conquistadors reveals Magoichi's mysterious past, and Saburo returns to put the Saika through rigorous training.

title: An Ebon Trial
overview: Time is running out, and if the Saika cannot complete Saburo's training, they may not live to fight the conquerors.

title: A Faint-Pink Prayer
overview: Saburo remembers his past with Hototogisu and another person who marked his life, and who made him decide to forge his own path in the future.

title: Peach Treachery
overview: Lucio has appeared and has already become a major threat to Magoichi and his friends. But he and the people of Saika seem to have another unexpected enemy.

title: Crimson Determination
overview: Saburo warns Magoichi, who must choose between sealing his friends' fate or his brother's, but the decision is too difficult. Perhaps there is still another way out?

title: A Mauve Wish
overview: Ageha acts unexpectedly, but her past can explain a lot. Even so, uncertainty haunts his days. Because of the upcoming fight against Lucio, there is no longer room for uncertainty...

title: Rusted Armors
overview: Magoichi is determined to have his brother back by his side, but Lucio seems equally determined to fulfill his ambitions of spreading death wherever he goes.
